member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Applications.CuhkCustomizeSrvice
member.summary: 香港中文大學客製化服務 這邊會直接操作,因為客製化的內容應該不多,所以就不再細分到單獨的服務

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController
member.summary: Controller for user-role and role-function assignment operations. Uses ILoginUserRoleService for string UserId (LoginUserData) and IRoleFunctionService.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.GetUserRoles(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all roles assigned to a user.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.AssignRoleToUser(System.String,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assign a role to a user.
member.remarks: This operation is idempotent - assigning an already assigned role returns success.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.UnassignRoleFromUser(System.String,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a role from a user.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.SyncRolesToUser(System.String,ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.BulkAssignRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sync multiple roles to a user in a single atomic operation.
member.remarks: If any role assignment fails, all assignments are rolled back. Already assigned roles are counted as successful (idempotent).

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.AssignRolesToUser(System.String,ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.BulkAssignRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assign multiple roles to a user in a single atomic operation.
member.remarks: If any role assignment fails, all assignments are rolled back. Already assigned roles are counted as successful (idempotent).

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.UnassignRolesFromUser(System.String,ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.BulkAssignRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove multiple roles from a user in a single atomic operation.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.GetRoleUsers(System.Guid,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all users assigned to a role (paginated).

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.GetRoleFunctions(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all functions assigned to a role.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.AssignFunctionToRole(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assign a function to a role.
member.remarks: This operation is idempotent - assigning an already assigned function returns success.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.UnassignFunctionFromRole(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a function from a role.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.SyncFunctionsToRole(System.Guid,ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.BulkAssignRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assign multiple functions to a role in a single atomic operation.
member.remarks: If any function assignment fails, all assignments are rolled back. Already assigned functions are counted as successful (idempotent).

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.AssignFunctionsToRole(System.Guid,ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.BulkAssignRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assign multiple functions to a role in a single atomic operation.
member.remarks: If any function assignment fails, all assignments are rolled back. Already assigned functions are counted as successful (idempotent).

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.UnassignFunctionsFromRole(System.Guid,ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.BulkAssignRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove multiple functions from a role in a single atomic operation.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AssignmentController.GetFunctionRoles(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all roles that have a specific function assigned.

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: 認證控制器，處理登入、登出和 Token 刷新

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthController.Login(ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthLoginRequest)
member.returns: 登入結果，包含 Token 和功能列表

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthController.Refresh(ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthRefreshRequest)
member.summary: 使用 Refresh Token 刷新 Access Token

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthLoginRequest
member.summary: 登入請求 (M001 修復：添加 Input Validation)

member.name: P:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthLoginRequest.RememberMe
member.summary: 是否記住我（延長 Refresh Token 有效期）

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.AuthRefreshRequest
member.summary: 刷新 Token 請求 (M001 修復：添加 Input Validation)

member.summary: 查詢資料庫並Echo到指定Server AE Title

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.FunctionManagementController
member.summary: Controller for function permission management CRUD operations. Demonstrates how to use IFunctionManagementService.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.FunctionManagementController.CreateFunction(TeraLinkaAuth.Contracts.Management.CreateFunctionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Function codes must be uppercase alphanumeric with underscores (e.g., "USER_READ", "REPORT_EXPORT"). Function codes are automatically normalized to uppercase.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.FunctionManagementController.GetFunctions(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a paginated list of functions.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.FunctionManagementController.UpdateFunction(System.Guid,TeraLinkaAuth.Contracts.Management.UpdateFunctionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Note: Function codes cannot be changed after creation.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.FunctionManagementController.DeleteFunction(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Functions with role assignments cannot be deleted. Remove all role assignments first.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.PacsSysConfigController.PostDicomServiceAction(System.String)
member.summary: 取得I-SoftViewer PACS Service的啟用狀況

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.QualityControlController.ModifyDicomTagsInFiles(System.Collections.Generic.List{ISoftViewerLibrary.Models.DTOs.SearchImagePathView},ISoftViewerLibrary.Models.BodyRequestParams.ImageTagModify)
member.summary: 修改 DICOM 文件中的標籤並保存

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.RoleManagementController
member.summary: Controller for role management CRUD operations. Demonstrates how to use IRoleManagementService.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.RoleManagementController.CreateRole(TeraLinkaAuth.Contracts.Management.CreateRoleRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Role codes must be uppercase alphanumeric with underscores (e.g., "ADMIN", "USER_MANAGER"). Role codes are automatically normalized to uppercase.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.RoleManagementController.GetRoles(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a paginated list of roles.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.RoleManagementController.UpdateRole(System.Guid,TeraLinkaAuth.Contracts.Management.UpdateRoleRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Note: Role codes cannot be changed after creation.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.RoleManagementController.DeleteRole(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Roles with user assignments cannot be deleted. Remove all user assignments first.

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.StoreDcmServiceController.CStoreStudy(System.String,ISoftViewerLibrary.Models.DTOs.CStoreDetails)
member.summary: 查詢資料庫並C-Store到指定Server AE Title

member.summary: 刪除單張影像 (Instance 層級)

member.summary: DICOM 影像路徑查詢服務

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UserAccountController
member.summary: 使用者帳號管理控制器 使用 TeraLinkaAuth 的 ILoginUserManagementService 進行用戶管理

member.summary: 取得所有帳號資訊 (分頁)

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UserAccountController.DeleteUser(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 刪除單一帳號 (軟刪除，設定 IsActive = false)

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UserAccountController.GetCurrentUser(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 取得目前登入使用者的資訊

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UserAccountController.UpdateMyPassword(ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UpdatePasswordRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 目前使用者修改自己的密碼

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UpdatePasswordRequest
member.param: 新密碼 (至少 8 個字元)

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UpdatePasswordRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: 新密碼 (至少 8 個字元)

member.name: P:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Controllers.UpdatePasswordRequest.NewPassword
member.summary: 新密碼 (至少 8 個字元)

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Hubs.ChatHub.GetOnlineAccount
member.summary: 獲取線上帳號，除了自己以外

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Hubs.UserIdProvider.UserIdProvider
member.summary: SignalR 使用者 ID 提供者 使用 TeraLinkaAuth 的 Claims 擴展來獲取使用者 ID

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Interfaces.IHandleCommand.HandleCommand``1(``0,System.Func{System.String,``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: 請求新增,修改及刪除命令

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandlerMiddleware
member.summary: 全域異常處理中介軟體 (M005 修復) 攔截未處理的異常，記錄詳細資訊，但只返回安全的錯誤訊息給用戶端

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Middleware.SecurityHeadersMiddleware
member.summary: 安全標頭中介軟體 (H003 / S7039 修復) 根據路由類型套用不同的 Content-Security-Policy： - API 路由 (/api/*, /swagger/*): 嚴格 CSP（default-src 'none'） - SPA 路由（其他所有路徑）: 適用於 MUI/Emotion CSS-in-JS 的 CSP

member.name: F:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Middleware.SecurityHeadersMiddleware.ApiPrefixes
member.summary: API 路由前綴 — 這些路由回傳 JSON，不需要 inline styles

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Middleware.SecurityHeadersMiddleware.IsApiRoute(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.PathString)
member.summary: 判斷是否為 API 路由

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Middleware.SecurityHeadersMiddleware.BuildSpaContentSecurityPolicy
member.summary: 建構 SPA 路由的 Content-Security-Policy。 MUI v5 + Emotion CSS-in-JS 在執行期動態注入 <style> 標籤， 必須允許 style-src 'unsafe-inline'。Nonce 方案無法涵蓋所有第三方元件 （ag-grid、CornerstoneJS），因此此處保留 'unsafe-inline'。

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Models.BatchModifyDicomTagData
member.summary: 批量修改 DICOM Tag 的資料模型

member.name: P:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Models.BatchModifyDicomTagData.Tags
member.summary: 要修改的 Tag 清單

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Models.HisLogStatusData
member.summary: 執行Log時,所記錄的訊息與結果

member.name: P:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Models.HisLogStatusData.EpisodeNo
member.summary: Episode No 本次入院就診號碼

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService
member.summary: 自動加密服務 - 在非開發環境啟動時自動加密敏感配置

member.name: F:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService.SensitiveKeyNames
member.summary: 敏感 key 名稱清單（不區分大小寫） 遇到這些 key 名稱時會自動加密其值

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService.EnsureConfigurationEncrypted(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment)
member.summary: 確保配置已加密（非 Development 環境）

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService.EncryptSecretsFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 加密 Secrets 檔案並輸出至 Encrypted 檔案 遞迴處理整個 JSON，遇到敏感 key 就加密，其餘原樣保留

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService.ProcessJsonObject(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonObject,System.String)
member.summary: 遞迴處理 JSON 物件，加密敏感欄位
member.param: 要處理的 JSON 物件

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService.ProcessJsonArray(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonArray,System.String)
member.summary: 遞迴處理 JSON 陣列

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.AutoEncryptionService.IsSensitiveKey(System.String)
member.summary: 判斷 key 名稱是否為敏感欄位

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DatabaseSchemaProvider
member.summary: 資料庫 Schema 提供者 - 定義系統所需的資料表結構 在這裡定義需要自動檢查和建立的資料表和欄位

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DatabaseSchemaProvider.GetTableDefinitions
member.summary: 取得需要同步的資料表定義

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DatabaseSchemaProvider.GetCustomMigrations
member.summary: 取得自訂遷移腳本 用於執行特定版本的資料庫變更

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DecryptedConfigurationProvider
member.summary: 解密配置提供者 - 自動解密 DPAPI 加密的配置值 使用遞迴掃描方式，根據 key 名稱判斷是否為敏感欄位

member.name: F:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DecryptedConfigurationProvider.SensitiveKeyNames
member.summary: 敏感 key 名稱清單（不區分大小寫） 與 AutoEncryptionService 保持一致

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DecryptedConfigurationProvider.ScanAndDecrypt(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationSection},System.String)
member.summary: 遞迴掃描配置並解密敏感欄位

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DecryptedConfigurationProvider.IsSensitiveKey(System.String)
member.summary: 判斷 key 名稱是否為敏感欄位

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DecryptedConfigurationExtensions.AddDecryptedConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder)
member.summary: 添加 DPAPI 解密支援 自動掃描所有配置，根據 key 名稱判斷是否需要解密

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.DecryptedConfigurationExtensions.HasAnyEncryptedValue(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationSection})
member.summary: 遞迴檢查是否有任何加密值

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.LRMarkerCorrectionService
member.summary: LR Marker 修正與還原的業務邏輯服務。 負責 DICOM 檔案操作、備份管理、路徑推導、C-Store 發送。

member.name: F:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.LRMarkerCorrectionService._issuedImageNumbers
member.summary: 記錄每個 Series 已發出的最大 ImageNumber，避免 PACS 尚未寫入 DB 時重複取號。 Key = SeriesInstanceUID, Value = 已發出的最大 ImageNumber。

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.LRMarkerCorrectionService.CorrectMarker(ISoftViewerLibrary.Models.DTOs.CorrectLRMarkerRequest)
member.summary: 執行 LR Marker 修正。

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.LRMarkerCorrectionService.RestoreMarker(ISoftViewerLibrary.Models.DTOs.RestoreLRMarkerRequest)
member.summary: 還原 LR Marker 至原始狀態。

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.LRMarkerCorrectionService.GetNextImageNumber(System.String)
member.summary: 查詢同 Series 下目前最大的 ImageNumber，結合 in-memory 已發出記錄，回傳 max + 1。 避免 PACS 尚未寫入 DB 時連續請求取到重複號碼。

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.SchemaMigrationHostedService
member.summary: Schema 遷移 Hosted Service - 在應用程式啟動時自動執行資料庫 Schema 檢查和遷移

member.name: T:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.SecureConfigurationService
member.summary: 安全配置服務 - 使用 DPAPI 加密/解密敏感配置 DPAPI 加密的資料只能在同一台機器上解密

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.SecureConfigurationService.Encrypt(System.String)
member.summary: 加密字串（使用 DPAPI - 僅限當前機器）

member.name: M:ISoftViewerQCSystem.Services.SecureConfigurationService.Decrypt(System.String)
member.param: 加密的字串（含 ENCRYPTED: 前綴）

member.name: T:ISoftViewerLibrary.Applications.Interface.IApplicationQueryService`1
member.summary: 泛形應用層環境服務介面

member.name: T:ISoftViewerLibrary.Applications.Interface.IApplicationQueryEnumerateService`1
member.summary: 泛形應用層環境查詢多組資料介面

member.name: T:ISoftViewerLibrary.Applications.Interface.IApplicationCmdService`1
member.summary: 泛形應用層更新服務介面
